prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data or specific news affecting ELV beyond my last training update. Therefore, this prediction is based on general market behavior and a statistical simulation. The point estimate assumes a minor upward drift from the current price ($344.12) to $344.20 for the next 1 day, reflecting a general tendency to either stabilize or show slight positive momentum without specific negative catalysts. Confidence intervals are calculated by estimating a daily standard deviation of 0.5% of the current price ($1.72) and applying standard Z-scores for each confidence level, assuming a normal distribution of daily price movements around the point estimate. This approach provides a plausible range but is not based on actual historical volatility data for ELV or current market conditions.
